comment: Death asset catalog. Source of truth для всех asset id → relative path. Парсится JsonAssetCatalog (см. WeTTeA.core.content.JsonAssetCatalog). path относителен корня assets/death/ (на desktop — classpath /assets/death/, на Android — assets/death/, на iOS — bundle Resources/assets/death/).

assets.comment: Stage 2.3b smoke OGG (0.2s 440Hz моно, libvorbis q=2).
Stage 2.1b vertex shader: hard-coded triangle через gl_VertexIndex + UV.
Stage 2.1b/3.1 fragment shader: sample texture by UV * vertex color (mix).
Stage 3.1 smoke texture: 64×64 RGBA8 шахматка 8×8 блоков (cyan/magenta), без alpha.
